Video.summary: Mosaics with The Crafty Chica
Video.title: The Crafty Chica: Mosaics

Image.alt: The Crafty Chica: Mosaics
The Crafty Chica: Mosaics

Video.summary: In this video, Kathy demonstrates how you can seal your favorite paint-pen-designs on glass.
Video.title: The Crafty Chica: How to Use Paint Pens on Glass - And Seal Them

Image.alt: The Crafty Chica: How to Use Paint Pens on Glass - And Seal Them
The Crafty Chica: How to Use Paint Pens on Glass - And Seal Them

Video.summary: Learn how to create a rainbow perler bead pattern.
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Rainbow Perler Bead Pattern

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Rainbow Perler Bead Pattern
FaveCrafts: Rainbow Perler Bead Pattern

Video.summary: Detailing a dress with The Crafty Chica
Video.title: The Crafty Chica: Marisa's Dress

Image.alt: The Crafty Chica: Marisa's Dress
The Crafty Chica: Marisa's Dress

Video.summary: Ready to start making perfect flower stems and friendship bracelets? This How to Use the Sizzix Twist and Style Tool guide shows you just how easy using this tool is. Plus, this is a great tool you can use for all different kinds of crafts that require a little extra twist. Whether you are making flowers and need a stem, or you are working with wire on some DIY jewelry projects, this tool can become your go to! This Sizzix tool is worth giving a try if you want to expand your craft tools collection!
Video.title: FaveCrafts: How to Use the Sizzix Twist and Style Tool

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: How to Use the Sizzix Twist and Style Tool
FaveCrafts: How to Use the Sizzix Twist and Style Tool

Video.summary: This is our first Frog Food of 2021 so let's hit the ground running and try something new: A detailed background! But not too detailed ... remember, baby steps. Join me for a little speed drawing and commentary!
Video.title: Digital Painting - Frog Food: DIY Anime Poster "METRO" - Speed Paint

Image.alt: Digital Painting - Frog Food: DIY Anime Poster "METRO" - Speed Paint
Digital Painting - Frog Food: DIY Anime Poster "METRO" - Speed Paint

Video.summary: Follow with Cheryl as she teaches this easy tutorial on how to make the Florentine Freeze pattern in your knitting.
Video.title: Knitting Stitch Along: Florentine Freeze

Image.alt: Knitting Stitch Along: Florentine Freeze
Knitting Stitch Along: Florentine Freeze

Video.summary: A quick Whisper Mini tour of my recent 6-panel cabinet project.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Cabinet Project Tour

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Cabinet Project Tour
The Wood Whisperer: Cabinet Project Tour

Video.summary: In part two of our three-part series, Aaron shows us how to make the frame parts for the top of our lid. Now these videos do assume that you’ve opened the program and have a little familiarity with the tools.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: SketchUp Basics - Trunk Lid Part 2

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: SketchUp Basics - Trunk Lid Part 2
The Wood Whisperer: SketchUp Basics - Trunk Lid Part 2

Video.summary: The base of this large table features a criss-cross design that does away with two of the aprons you'd find in a typical table base. I honestly wasn't sure if it would work and the only way to find out was to build one.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Criss-Cross Table

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Criss-Cross Table
The Wood Whisperer: Criss-Cross Table

Video.summary: If you find that your blades and bits just aren't performing like they used to, you might not need to send them out for a sharpening. They might just be in desperate need of a good cleaning.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Cleaning Blades & Bits

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Cleaning Blades & Bits
The Wood Whisperer: Cleaning Blades & Bits

Video.summary: Krylon recently released a line of exterior wood stains in spray form. A very convenient way to transfer color to your outdoor projects! I sprayed 6 different test boards (maple and white oak) just to see how well the stain applies.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Krylon Spray Stain

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Krylon Spray Stain
The Wood Whisperer: Krylon Spray Stain

Video.summary: A wall-mounted rack to store your 3D filament.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Filament Rack - For 3D Printing

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Filament Rack - For 3D Printing
The Wood Whisperer: Filament Rack - For 3D Printing

Video.summary: Whenever I have a new student in the shop, I try to convey what if feels like when something is going wrong on the tablesaw. This may seem like an abstract idea, but knowing how to identify a problem before it goes too far could give you that extra second or two you need to prevent disaster.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Shop Safety - Tablesaw Experience

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Shop Safety - Tablesaw Experience
The Wood Whisperer: Shop Safety - Tablesaw Experience

Video.summary: I glue the back panel strips to the shelves, add an extra ebony adornment with a slot-cutting bit, and give a relatively lengthy tutorial on chopping the resulting mortise nice and square. I finish up by creating the ebony strips for the front of the top and bottom case pieces and then I finally glue the case together.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Gadget Station Part 9

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Gadget Station Part 9
The Wood Whisperer: Gadget Station Part 9

Video.summary: Looking for a new property with a shop in Missouri.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Property Search and a Bad Surprise

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Property Search and a Bad Surprise
The Wood Whisperer: Property Search and a Bad Surprise

Video.summary: This Convertible Bench is designed for versatility and style. Each section has two positions allowing for numerous configurations. It's a bench, a 2-seat bench, a table, a love seat, and even a chair with an end table, all in one piece of furniture!
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Convertible Bench

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Convertible Bench
The Wood Whisperer: Convertible Bench

Video.summary: In the final part of our series, Aaron puts the finishing touches on the trunk lid. If this is your first experience with SketchUp, I highly recommend checking out the tutorials located at Sketch Up For Woodworkers
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: SketchUp Basics - Trunk Lid Part 3

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: SketchUp Basics - Trunk Lid Part 3
The Wood Whisperer: SketchUp Basics - Trunk Lid Part 3

Video.summary: This large assembly table is a great inexpensive alternative to the long and cumbersome process of building a torsion box.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: My New BIG Assembly Table

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: My New BIG Assembly Table
The Wood Whisperer: My New BIG Assembly Table

Video.summary: Marc teaches how to finish up your arts & crafts table so it will serve you for a long long time.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: How to Build an Arts & Crafts Table

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: How to Build an Arts & Crafts Table
The Wood Whisperer: How to Build an Arts & Crafts Table

Video.summary: An update on the effectiveness of Carbon Method's Carbon Coat product for rust prevention in a humid climate.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Carbon Method Update

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Carbon Method Update
The Wood Whisperer: Carbon Method Update

Video.summary: The pain of refinishing isn't that bad when you're learning with Marc! Follow the master woodworker as he refinishes his projects and teaches you a couple of his secrets.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: DIY Refinishing

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: DIY Refinishing
The Wood Whisperer: DIY Refinishing

Video.summary: A compact plywood cart that saves space and organize full sheets and scraps.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Space-Saving Plywood Cart

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Space-Saving Plywood Cart
The Wood Whisperer: Space-Saving Plywood Cart

Video.summary: The second and final video in this series covers finishing and assembly. As with any project, you should always ask yourself if it might be better to pre-finish the parts. Since the rocking horse would be incredibly difficult to finish after assembly and all of our parts are screwed together, pre-finishing was a no-brainer.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Rocking Horse Part 2

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Rocking Horse Part 2
The Wood Whisperer: Rocking Horse Part 2

Video.summary: A few months ago, I woke up one morning, poured my coffee, and was incredibly disappointed to see that my cutting board exploded!
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Cutting Board Disaster

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Cutting Board Disaster
The Wood Whisperer: Cutting Board Disaster

Video.summary: This is just a quick (silly) video of me assembling an Eagle America coping sled. I find this type of sled is not only helpful, but a necessity, when making frames and raised panel doors. It’s a great jig for running those narrow pieces through a big router bit.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Coping Cabana

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Coping Cabana
The Wood Whisperer: Coping Cabana

Video.summary: Madonna teaches Nestled.
Video.title: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: 2023 Day 17 - Nestled

Image.alt: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: 2023 Day 17 - Nestled
Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: 2023 Day 17 - Nestled

Image.alt: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: 2023 Day 13 - Dispersal
Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: 2023 Day 13 - Dispersal

Video.summary: What's up guys! For today's Frog Food we are making paper dolls from start to finish. From poses to clothing we've got ya covered, so sit back, relax and enjoy!!
Video.title: Digital Painting - Frog Food: Draw With Me - Paper Dolls

Image.alt: Digital Painting - Frog Food: Draw With Me - Paper Dolls
Digital Painting - Frog Food: Draw With Me - Paper Dolls

Image.alt: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: 2023 Day 11 - Ignition
Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: 2023 Day 11 - Ignition

Video.summary: Join DIY expert and mom, Lynn Lilly as she welcomes creatives, chefs, moms and entrepreneurs to the Craft Box Girls Studio. In today's show we are having back to school fun.

Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Back to School Fun

Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: Day 13 - Lens Stars

Video.summary: Join DIY expert and mom, Lynn Lilly as she welcomes creatives, chefs, moms and entrepreneurs to the Craft Box Girls Studio. In today's show we are making first day of school memories.

Image.alt: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: First Day of School Memories

Video.summary: Paper rolls take on a colorful twist- join Kim in creating giant crayons.
Video.title: The Best Ideas For Kids: Paper Roll Crayons

Image.alt: The Best Ideas For Kids: Paper Roll Crayons
The Best Ideas For Kids: Paper Roll Crayons

Video.summary: This cute Candy Drawer DIY Party Favor is an excellent, customizable DIY favor for just about any occasion. Fill the tiny drawer with candy and leave them on tables as a DIY wedding favor, or fill them with kind notes and hand out to your friends the next time you host girls' night. No matter what you use it for, this free paper craft idea is a great little project! Check out this video tutorial to learn how to make them.
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Candy Drawer DIY Party Favor

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Candy Drawer DIY Party Favor
FaveCrafts: Candy Drawer DIY Party Favor

Video.summary: Learn how to make a beautiful vintage plate cake stand.
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Vintage Plate DIY Cake Stand

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Vintage Plate DIY Cake Stand
FaveCrafts: Vintage Plate DIY Cake Stand

Video.summary: Join DIY expert and mom, Lynn Lilly as she welcomes creatives, chefs, moms and entrepreneurs to the Craft Box Girls Studio. In today's show we're dipping into some summer treats.

Image.alt: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Dipping into Summer Eats & Crafts

Video.summary: Join DIY expert and mom, Lynn Lilly as she welcomes creatives, chefs, moms and entrepreneurs to the Craft Box Girls Studio. In today's show, we're celebrating summer fun and Father's Day.

Video.summary: Collect some rocks and turn them into these adorable pet cactus rocks. These make the cutest desk friend.
Video.title: The Best Ideas For Kids: Pet Cactus Rocks

The Best Ideas For Kids: Pet Cactus Rocks
